context_text: " So the Woodman took his axe and began to chop down small trees to make a raft, and while he was busy at this the Scarecrow found on the riverbank a tree full of fine fruit.

context_text: "The best plan will be to walk along the riverbank until we come to the road again," remarked the Lion.
